title: The Fellas
html:
Stub. "The fellas" / "the core fellas" — Yahir's OSU-era inner-circle friend group in Corvallis, 2021-2024. Recurring referent across his 2022-2023 monologues, almost always in tension with him: present enough to define his social context, absent the "elevation" he wants from a peer group.

Surfacings:

  • 2022 10 15 relationships and fitting in — peer-pressure source on the question "why am I not in a relationship like every fella has."
  • 2023 01 31 environment situation — explicit named: the core fellas want to townhouse together; Yahir says they're "not the circle that's going to elevate me."
  • 2021 05 26 osu housing — the dorm-selection that set up the fellas-as-future-friend-group bet.

Open: who the named members are. Henry, Luek, Marc, Kyle, Gabe Puerto Rico, Cade Buchanon, Ashwin, Peter Layzell, Nicolas Rist all surface in the Jan-2023 doc, but only henry is promoted in the vault to date.
